title: minuartia mutabilis subsp. lesurina
intro: Minuartia mutabilis subsp. lesurina, also known as the variable chickweed or changeable wintergreen, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Minuartia mutabilis subsp. lesurina can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
